rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. POPE & POPE PROPERTIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 04, 2014 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT Sustained. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the first cause of action for breach of contract. First Amended Cross-Complaint does not allege and the opposition does not suggest that an allegation can be made that Wells Fargo and Alkhasov were parties to the "employment" agreement; and how Wells Fargo breached such agreement. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the third cause of action for conversion. No opposition. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the second cause of action for cross-complainant to allege facts demonstrating that Alkhasov is a party to the lease; to attach the lease; and to all elements of any viable cause of action based on the alleged lock-out. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT VS. SUZANA YUEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 04, 2014 line 4. PLAINTIFF EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. Opposing party and its counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the opposition to department 501 no later than 4:00 p.m. on December 3, 2014. This is a second request for compliance. = (501/REQ)
